name: Acrobatics
description: Measuring your agility, including balance and stunting.

name: Arcana
description: Recalling lore about spells, magic items, and planes of existence.

name: Athletics
description: Physical activities like climbing, jumping, or swimming.

name: Deception
description: Hiding the truth, either verbally or through actions.

name: History
description: Recalling lore about historical events, people, and kingdoms.

name: Insight
description: Determining the true intentions of a creature.

name: Intimidation
description: Influencing someone through overt threats or hostility.

name: Investigation
description: Looking for clues and making deductions.

name: Medicine
description: Stabilizing a dying creature or diagnosing an illness.

name: Nature
description: Recalling lore about terrain, plants, and animals.

name: Performance
description: Delighting an audience with music, dance, or acting.

name: Persuasion
description: Influencing someone with tact and social grace.

name: Religion
description: Recalling lore about deities, rites, and holy symbols.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Manual trickery, such as pocket picking or concealing objects.

name: Stealth
description: Escaping notice by moving silently and hiding.

name: Survival
description: Following tracks, hunting, and navigating the wilderness.
